content:
In my opinion, it's a 10/10! I'll wait a bit before validating, in case another player has an idea for improvement... personally, I don't have any! :D

EDIT: Oh, maybe review test pairs 1 and 4 so that validator better matches the difficulty of the related test.

Thank you! Regarding your suggestion for test pairs 1 and 4, that makes total sense—aligning the validator with the specific difficulty of those tests will definitely make for a smoother experience. I will get on that and make those adjustments a bit later today.

Cases
* Each test and its validator must cover the *same scenario* with slightly different inputs and outputs. Hence, every existing case should be expanded into a pair: 1 test + 1 validator.

* Please use more randomised strings as inputs, while ensuring that all digits from 0 to 9 appear across the visible tests, and likewise across the validators.

* Please add a pair of cases where the same digit appears in separate groups within the input (e.g. 3 groups of 4 appearing in different parts of the input).

* Please ensure the cases cover the full constraint range (1 ≤ length of S ≤ 500) in a balanced way. For example, include very short inputs, medium-length inputs, and cases close to the upper bound. You may also reduce the upper bound of 100 to make modification easier.

Thanks.
